landing.title: Welcome to Pawdar
landing.subtitle: Pawdar is an all-in-one companion ecosystem designed to track health, connect pet lovers, and celebrate every happy moment of your pet's life with absolute care and love.
landing.feature1Desc: Monitor health metrics, check-ups, and dietary habits effortlessly.
landing.feature2Desc: Connect with local pet owners, vets, and pet enthusiasts near you.
landing.feature3Desc: Never miss a vet visit or feeding schedule again.
landing.radarSubtitle: A specialized search and rescue network for lost pets. Once activated, the alert is instantly broadcasted to the entire local community.
landing.radarFeature1Desc: Pinpoint the exact location where your pet went missing on an interactive map for easy local search.
landing.radarFeature2Desc: WebSockets broadcast updates instantly. RabbitMQ pushes background alerts to pet owners within a 2km radius.
landing.videoSubtitle: Experience the professional rescue geolocation interface, connecting the close-range pet owner community to keep pets safe.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: Real stories of connection, successful rescue, and happy pet care journey from our beloved users.
landing.testimonial1Story: My puppy Bella went missing at the park. I activated the SOS Radar on Pawdar, and in just 45 minutes, someone 800m away sent a photo confirming her location. I'm so grateful!
landing.testimonial2Story: Since using Pawdar's smart reminders, I never miss Max's vaccination or routine vet check-ups. The visual health tracking dashboard is incredibly convenient.
landing.testimonial3Story: In the middle of the night, Luna showed unusual symptoms. Thanks to Pawdar's nearby vet finder, I quickly connected with an on-duty vet for urgent video support.
landing.faqSubtitle: Answering your most common questions about the features and resources of the Pawdar pet care platform.
landing.faqQ1: What is Pawdar and how does it work?
landing.faqA1: Pawdar is an all-in-one pet care ecosystem that helps you track health metrics, set smart reminders, connect with local pet lovers, and activate emergency rescue alerts when needed.
landing.faqQ2: How does the SOS Radar work when a pet goes missing?
landing.faqA2: When you activate the SOS Radar, the system uses WebSockets and RabbitMQ to broadcast instant emergency alerts to all Pawdar users within a 2km radius of your pet's last known location.
landing.faqQ3: Can I track multiple pets at the same time?
landing.faqA3: Yes, absolutely! The Pawdar dashboard allows you to add and manage multiple pets under a single account, tracking separate health scores, vaccination schedules, and care logs for each pet.
landing.faqQ4: How do I connect with a veterinarian on the platform?
landing.faqA4: Pawdar integrates a veterinary finder map showing clinics and doctors nearby. You can read reviews, book appointments directly, or make urgent virtual calls for professional medical advice.
landing.faqQ5: Is the uploaded pet photo secure?
landing.faqA5: Absolutely secure. The pet photo uploaded for the ID card is processed locally in your browser or stored with secure encryption for generating the card and profile display, and is never shared with third parties.
landing.faqQ6: What information does the SOS Radar map display?
landing.faqA6: When you activate the lost mode, the Radar map will display the avatar, name, identification features, and the last known location of your pet. Other users in the vicinity will receive push notifications to assist in the search.
landing.faqQ7: Does the app support automatic vaccination reminders?
landing.faqA7: Yes. Just input the date of the last vaccination and the type of vaccine, and Pawdar's smart care system will automatically calculate the next due date and send reminders via email and mobile push notifications 3 days in advance.
landing.faqQ8: Can I print the pet ID card after downloading?
landing.faqA8: Yes, absolutely! The downloaded card image is exported in high resolution (3x), perfect for printing as a hard plastic neck tag or a sticker keepsake for your pet.
landing.idSubtitle: Experience designing a unique smart pet identity card. Instantly calculate human age equivalent and explore professional health tips.
landing.idTipPuppy: Recommendation: Administer 3 core puppy vaccinations, deworm monthly, and feed high-protein puppy food to support bone and joint growth.
landing.idTipKitten: Recommendation: Vaccinate for 4 core diseases, supplement taurine for eyes/heart, and schedule spaying/neutering at 5-6 months.
landing.idTipAdultDog: Recommendation: Deworm every 3-6 months, take annual rabies vaccine, and maintain 30-60 minutes of daily physical exercise.
landing.idTipAdultCat: Recommendation: Control portions to prevent obesity, brush coat daily to reduce hairballs, and keep annual core vaccinations up to date.
landing.idTipSeniorDog: Recommendation: Schedule vet check-ups every 6 months, restrict jumping/high impact activities, and add Glucosamine for joint health.
landing.idTipSeniorCat: Recommendation: Increase clean water intake to prevent urinary diseases, check kidney function regularly, and transition to softer food.

main.news1Title: The Perfect Nutrition Guide to Keep Your Dog Healthy
main.news1Desc: Learn about essential nutrients, proper portion control, and human foods you should absolutely avoid feeding your dog.
main.news2Title: Decoding Cat Body Language: What Is Your Cat Telling You?
main.news2Desc: From ear positions and tail wags to soft purrs, decode the subtle signals your feline companion uses to communicate.
main.news3Title: 5 Simple Steps to Make Your Home Safely Pet-Friendly
main.news3Desc: How to arrange furniture, remove toxic household plants, and design a cozy rest corner for your dogs and cats.
